title: SRE: Fix Frontend Rendering Bugs
description: The page is blank because the React application is crashing when mapping over 'logs' and 'teams' arrays which might be undefined or error payloads from the API. The SRE agent needs to fix BettingApp/frontend/src/app/page.tsx by making Array.isArray checks around the .map() calls for logs and teams, just like was done for bets.
